cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Leslie could have gone to the beach. The problem gives us several alibis from different people, and we need to check when Leslie was free. First, let's list out all the times Leslie was seen doing different activities: 1. Leslie woke up at 5am. That's just a starting point, not an activity with a time frame yet. 2. Emily saw Leslie in class from 5am to 9am. So Leslie was at school during that time. 3. Anthony saw Leslie watching a movie from 9am to 11am. So after class, Leslie went to the theater. 4. Thomas saw Leslie buying cookies from 11am to 4pm. That's a long time at the bakery. 5. Ashley saw Leslie fixing their computer from 4pm to 5pm. So after the bakery, Leslie went to an electronics store. 6. Susan saw Leslie walking towards the Statue of Liberty from 9pm to 10pm. So Leslie was out again late at night. 7. The beach was closed
